channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Harris faces new urgency to explain how her potential presidency would be different from Biden's
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris is facing new urgency to define how her potential presidency would be different from President Joe Biden's.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: A federal judge will hear more evidence on whether to reopen voter registration in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — At least for now, a federal judge won’t order the state of Georgia to reopen voter registration for November’s elections. U.S.
item.dc:creator: JEFF AMY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Maryland Senate poll shows Democrat Alsobrooks maintaining lead in closely watched race
item.description: Prince George's County Executive Angela Alsobrooks has a sizeable lead over former Maryland Gov. Larry Hogan in a UMBC poll. The candidates are running for US Senate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump's 'God Bless the USA' Bibles printed in China, records show
item.description: Thousands of copies of former President Trump's "God Bless the USA" Bible were printed in China, according to trade records.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics: Is Harris or Trump more accessible?
item.description: The latest updates from the 2024 campaign trail, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How US government will dole out aid to victims of Hurricanes Milton, Helene
item.description: As a second and possibly more devastating hurricane barrels toward the U.S., there are concerns over how the government will help pay for what could be millions in damage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Supreme Court seems likely to give Oklahoma death row inmate a new day in court
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Supreme Court appeared likely Wednesday to give Oklahoma death row inmate Richard Glossip at least another day in court in his long quest to throw out his murder conviction and death sentence.
item.dc:creator: MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Human Rights Campaign launching ad blitz for Harris, other Democrats
item.description: Human Rights Campaign (HRC) and its Equality Votes political action committee are launching a multimillion-dollar digital ad blitz aimed at reaching "equality voters" for the Harris-Walz ticket in key battleground states, the group announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Afghan national charged with Election Day terror plot reignites vetting concerns: ‘Glaring alarms’
item.description: The arrest of an Afghan national, who came to the U.S. after the withdrawal from Afghanistan in 2021, on terror charges is refueling concerns about the vetting of those who arrived.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Social Security's scheduled cost of living increase 'won't make a dent' for some retirees
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Sherri Myers, an 82-year-old resident of Pensacola City, Florida, says the Social Security cost-of-living increase she'll receive in January “won't make a dent” in helping her meet her day-to-day expenses. “Inflation has eaten up my savings," she said.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Former Sen. Tim Johnson, the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota, dies at 77
item.description: SIOUX FALLS, S.D. (AP) — Former Sen. Tim Johnson, a centrist who was the last Democrat to hold statewide office in South Dakota and who was adept at securing federal funding for projects back home during his nearly three decades in Washington, has died. He was 77.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kamala Harris' failure at 'prosecutor 101' basics led to hundreds of drug convictions being tossed out: expert
item.description: Kamala Harris faced a scandal in 2010 when she served as San Francisco district attorney, which resulted in her office dismissing an estimated 1,000 drug cases and convictions.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Florida Republican suggests Greene have ‘head examined’ over hurricane claims
item.description: Florida Republican Rep. Carlos A. Gimenez suggested Wednesday that Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.) should have her “head examined” after she claimed humans can control the weather.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Swing state GOP chair slams Biden-Harris admin for being out of touch on key issue: 'Abandoned this country'
item.description: Fox News Digital spoke with Arizona GOP Chairwoman Gina Swoboda about VP Harris' recent trip to the border, which Swoboda dismissed as a political "photo op.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump offers prayers for people in hurricane's path after lashing out at Harris and other women
item.description: Former President Donald Trump offered his prayers to those in the path of Hurricane Milton as it lashed Florida while continuing to insult his rival, Vice President Kamala Harris, and other women.
item.dc:creator: Will Weissert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Democrats discuss party disillusionment, donor culture
item.description: "I went to the DNC hoping to feel reinspired. I really, really did," former Democratic campaign fundraiser Evan Barker said.
item.dc:creator: Chris Cuomo, NewsNation

item.title: Harris, Walz appeared on ABC's 'The View' and 'Jimmy Kimmel Live'
item.description: The Democratic presidential ticket is on a media blitz in New York. Vice President Kamala Harris appeared Tuesday on ABC's “The View," and her running mate, Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz appeared on ABC's “Jimmy Kimmel Live” on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Dolton Mayor Tiffany Henyard walks out as trustees address budget deficit
item.description: "I just want to come here and lay the law down as it relates to what's going on in our village, where we are, and where we're going," Dolton Mayor Tiffany Henyard said.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Conservative senator lays out proposals for post-McConnell reforms
item.description: Sen. Mike Lee (R-Utah), the chair of the conservative Senate Steering Committee, has laid out a list of proposed reforms designed to ensure that the next Senate Republican leader does not have the same power as outgoing Senate GOP Leader Mitch McConnell (Ky.).
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, NewsNation

item.title: Harris slips in national survey, now leads Trump by 3 points
item.description: Vice President Harris has slipped slightly in new Reuters/Ipsos polling, now leading former President Trump among registered voters by a slim 3-point margin as Election Day draws closer.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Trump's shifting abortion stance raises questions for evangelical support
item.description: Former President Trump’s softening stance on reproductive health has raised questions about his standing with white evangelical voters, a key part of his coalition dating back to 2016.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: DeSantis pushes back on 'delusional' Harris remark about Hurricane Milton calls
item.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis (R) said Monday that it was “delusional” for Vice President Kamala Harris to accuse him of “political gamesmanship” after reports emerged that he did not take the Democratic presidential nominee’s calls as his state braces for Hurricane Milton.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, Fox 5

item.title: Harris leads Trump among California Latino voters by 23 points
item.description: Vice President Harris holds a strong lead over former President Trump among California Hispanics, according to a Telemundo poll released Tuesday. The California survey contrasts with a similar poll released earlier this month of Florida Hispanic voters, which found Trump leading Harris.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, Fox 5

item.title: Harris and Trump mark somber anniversary of Hamas’ Oct. 7 attack on Israel
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Former President Donald Trump and Vice President Kamala Harris marked the anniversary of the deadliest attack on Jews since the Holocaust as the presidential candidates approach the final weeks of the campaign during a widening conflict in the Middle East.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, COLLEEN LONG and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Exclusive poll shows tight races for NY-17 and NY-18 congressional seats
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- New exclusive PIX11 polling with Emerson College and The Hill reveals two incredibly close races and even a ballot controversy just four weeks from election day.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Trump mass deportation plan embraced by some border sheriffs
item.description: Speaking exclusively to NewsNation last week, Trump detailed why he would utilize the expertise of local authorities for his deportation plans.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Trump intends to use military to round up opponents: Michael Cohen
item.description: “The big warning that I want people to understand is when Donald Trump says something, stop sane washing it. Stop trying to make it into something which has some normalcy to it. What he says, he intends to do.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, Fox 5

item.title: It’s a close race for Michigan. These factors could decide it for Harris or Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris needs to win back Michigan voters President Joe Biden looked poised to lose. Donald Trump’s appeal remains strong here, but he’s not without his own struggles.
item.dc:creator: Majd Al-Waheidi, MPR News

item.title: Trump's plan would add $4 trillion more to U.S. debt compared to Harris', analysis says
item.description: Neither former President Donald Trump nor Vice President Kamala Harris have plans to fix the national debt, risking "an eventual fiscal crisis," a budget nonprofit group found in its analysis.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Trump is returning to Butler, the site of the 1st assassination attempt against him
item.description: The rally will mark Trump's first time back in the Pennsylvania city since the failed assassination attempt against him in July. The guest list will include a shooting survivor, as well as Elon Musk.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben, MPR News
